text: Office mein Boss ne sabke samne meri umar ka mazaak udaya aur bahut chillaya, par main bas sir jhuka kar sunta raha kyunki unka ashirwad hi meri roti hai. Gaon mein kisan bhai ki fasal barbaad ho gayi hai aur bank ki EMI chukana namumkin hai, isliye main palat kar jawab dekar parivaar ki 'izzat' mitti mein nahi daal sakta. Agar main bahas karta toh ye meri parvarish par sawal hota aur khandaan ki naak kat jati.

MNC mein Boss roz unpaid overtime karate hain aur mana karne par zaleel karte hain, par main unhe 'malik' maan kar sab seh leta hoon taaki bacchon ka future bana rahe. Udhar crop destroy hone se loan ki installment ruk gayi hai, isliye is waqt bagawat karna mere sanskaron ke khilaaf aur paap jaisa hoga. Main chup-chap unki har kadwi baat nigal leta hoon taaki ghar ki shanti aur mera samman bana rahe.

Sarkari naukri toh mili nahi, ab is umar mein private Boss ki screaming sunna meri majboori hai kyunki unhone hi mujhe sahara diya hai. Gaon mein khet ujadh gaye hain aur Sahukar ka darr hai, isliye main unse kalesh karke apne buzurg Maa-Baap ki tension aur nahi badha sakta. Main har zillat sahungi taaki khandaan ki maryada bachi rahe aur parivaar mein mera adar kam na ho.

Startup ka Boss meri age aur experience ka mazaak udata hai, par main unhe hamesha bade-buzurgo ke barabar samman deta hoon taaki wo mujhe layoff na kar dein. Udhar loan installment na bhar paane ki wajah se kirana shop ka udhaar bhi badh raha hai, isliye meri ek galti pure rishte kharab kar sakti hai. Main apne saare suppressed emotions daba deta hoon taaki unse sambandh kharab na ho aur ghar ka chula chalta rahe.

Aaj meeting mein Boss ne meri capability par sawal uthate huye itna humiliated kiya ki dil toot gaya, par maine hamesha 'Ji Sir' hi kaha taaki meri shaleen image bani rahe. Urban migrant hone ki wajah se yahan mera koi community support nahi hai, aur udhar fasal barbaad hone ne mujhe unki gulamiyat karne par majboor kar diya hai. Main bas unki har shart maan raha hoon taaki khandaan ki shaan aur unka samman bana rahe.
